cards.title: Vectors
cards.governance_note: Define dimensions, scaling, metric, compatibility, and interpretation boundaries.

cards.title: Embeddings
cards.governance_note: Document model, version, source, preprocessing, chunking, and vector compatibility.

cards.title: Semantic Retrieval
cards.governance_note: Validate nearest-neighbor results, thresholds, metadata filters, source display, and reranking behavior.

cards.title: Meaning Overclaim
cards.governance_note: Treat similarity as a computational signal, not as identity, truth, authority, or final interpretation.
